payload.title: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan
payload.description: Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan detailing recurring and specific agenda items by month from October 2023 through September 2024

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.raw_text: Metropolitan Transportation Authority
Long Island Rail Road Committee Work Plan
MTA Police will highlight the significant police activities incurred during the month reported.
LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update President
East Side Access Support Projects Update

payload.description: The Committee will be briefed on the status of the East Side Access Support Projects.

tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations near Jamaica in support of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project.

payload.description: Winter Trackwork Programs to support the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project with switch installations near Jamaica. Additionally, trackwork programs will support Switch Maintenance near Valley Stream, and Rail Maintenance on the Wreck Lead Bridge in Island Park.

tool_args.raw_text: LIRR/MNR PTC Project Update - The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads which went into effect in December 2020.

payload.description: The committee will be briefed on the status of project implementation and close-out following full Positive Train Control functionality for both railroads which went into effect in December 2020.

tool_args.raw_text: Joint Railroad Strategic Priorities Update - In alignment with MTA's strategic priorities, a biannual report to the Committee on the Railroads' progress in delivering safe and reliable transportation and excellent customer service.

payload.description: In alignment with MTA's strategic priorities, a biannual report to the Committee on the Railroads' progress in delivering safe and reliable transportation and excellent customer service.

tool_args.raw_text: October 2023 - 2023 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment) LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update President Fall Trackwork Programs & Holiday Service Service Planning M/W Quarterly Update Engineering

payload.description: Specific agenda items for October 2023 include: 2023 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment), LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update, President Fall Trackwork Programs & Holiday Service, Service Planning, M/W Quarterly Update, Engineering.

tool_args.raw_text: November 2023 - Joint Railroad Strategic Priorities Update President East Side Access Support Projects Update President/Sr. Staff Winter Trackwork Programs Service Planning

payload.description: Specific agenda items for November 2023 include: Joint Railroad Strategic Priorities Update, President, East Side Access Support Projects Update, President/Sr. Staff, Winter Trackwork Programs, Service Planning.

tool_args.raw_text: December 2023 - 2024 Final Proposed Budget Management & Budget 2024 Proposed Committee Work Plan Committee Chair & Members Diversity/EEO Report – 3 rd Q 2023 Administration/Diversity Year End Holiday Service Service Planning Review of Committee Charter Committee Chair & Members

payload.description: Specific agenda items for December 2023 include: 2024 Final Proposed Budget, Management & Budget, 2024 Proposed Committee Work Plan, Committee Chair & Members, Diversity/EEO Report - 3rd Q 2023, Administration/Diversity, Year End Holiday Service, Service Planning, Review of Committee Charter, Committee Chair & Members.

tool_args.raw_text: January 2024 - Approval of 2024 Committee Work Plan Committee Chairs & Members Winter Trackwork Programs Service Planning M/W Quarterly Update Engineering

payload.description: Specific agenda items for January 2024 include: Approval of 2024 Committee Work Plan, Committee Chairs & Members, Winter Trackwork Programs, Service Planning, M/W Quarterly Update, Engineering.

tool_args.raw_text: February 2024 - Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2024 Management & Budget 2023 Annual Operating Results Operations Winter Trackwork Programs Service Planning

payload.description: Specific agenda items for February 2024 include: Adopted Budget/Financial Plan 2024, Management & Budget, 2023 Annual Operating Results, Operations, Winter Trackwork Programs, Service Planning.

tool_args.raw_text: March 2024 - Annual Elevator/Escalator Report Spring Trackwork Programs Engineering Service Planning

payload.description: Specific agenda items for March 2024 include: Annual Elevator/Escalator Report, Spring Trackwork Programs, Engineering, Service Planning.

tool_args.raw_text: April 2024 - 2023 Annual Ridership Report May Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs Diversity/EEO Report – 4 th Q 2023 Finance/Marketing Service Planning Administration/Diversity

payload.description: Specific agenda items for April 2024 include: 2023 Annual Ridership Report, May Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs, Diversity/EEO Report - 4th Q 2023, Finance/Marketing, Service Planning, Administration/Diversity.

tool_args.raw_text: May 2024 - Final Review of 2023 Operating Budget Results M/W Quarterly Update Summer Service & Trackwork Programs LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update Management & Budget Engineering Service Planning President

payload.description: Specific agenda items for May 2024 include: Final Review of 2023 Operating Budget Results, M/W Quarterly Update, Summer Service & Trackwork Programs, LIRR/MNR PTC Implementation Update, Management & Budget, Engineering, Service Planning, President.

tool_args.raw_text: June 2024 - Joint Railroad Strategic Priorities Update Summer Track Work Programs Diversity/EEO Report – 1 st Quarter 2024 President Service Planning Administration/Diversity

payload.description: Specific agenda items for June 2024 include: Joint Railroad Strategic Priorities Update, Summer Track Work Programs, Diversity/EEO Report - 1st Quarter 2024, President, Service Planning, Administration/Diversity.

tool_args.raw_text: July 2024 - M/W Quarterly Update September Timetable Change & Trackwork Programs Engineering Service Planning

tool_args.raw_text: September 2024 - 2025 Preliminary Budget (Public Comment) 2024 Mid-Year Forecast Fall Trackwork Programs Diversity/EEO Report – 2 nd Quarter 2024 Management & Budget Service Planning Administration/Diversity

tool_args.raw_text: East Side Access Support Projects Update - November 2023 agenda item. The Committee will be briefed on the status of the East Side Access Support Projects.

payload.description: East Side Access Support Projects Update is a specific agenda item for the November 2023 Long Island Rail Road Committee meeting.

tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plan to temporarily adjust schedules for a series of Switch Installations near Jamaica in support of the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project. Additionally, trackwork programs will support Switch Maintenance near Valley Stream, and Rail Maintenance on the Wreck Lead Bridge in Island Park.

payload.description: Winter Trackwork Programs support both the Jamaica Capacity Improvement Project and East Side Access Readiness projects.

tool_args.raw_text: This is to inform the Long Island Committee of the MTA Long Island Rail Road's plans to adjust schedules to support various trackwork programs, Main Line Second Track construction and East Side Access Readiness projects

payload.description: Summer Track Work Programs support East Side Access Readiness projects, Main Line Second Track construction, and various trackwork programs.
